name: Community Bank
description_short: Community Bank in Alva, OK, at 1729 College Blvd, provides local banking services to College Avenue residents.
description_long:
Community Bank operates a branch at 1729 College Blvd in Alva, OK, serving residents of this College Avenue location. The Alva branch is a standalone banking facility, not housed within another store or mall. Specific branch hours are not currently published, so potential visitors from Alva should contact the bank to confirm operating times.

At this Alva location, Community Bank offers standard personal and business banking services. Customers visiting the 1729 College Blvd branch can handle deposits, withdrawals, and account services. Contact information for this specific Alva branch should be obtained directly from Community Bank to discuss services available.

For Alva residents and businesses in this part of northwest Oklahoma, the College Boulevard location provides direct access to Community Bank's banking services. Bring your valid government ID and account information when you visit. Community Bank is dedicated to serving the Alva, OK community's financial needs.
pros: FDIC insured deposits protect customer funds up to applicable limits
Extended drive-thru hours including Saturday morning access (8 AM-1 PM) for working customers
Established 40+ year history serving Alva community since 1984
Multiple ATM locations including campus (NWOSU) and convenience store (Ampride) for accessibility
Online mortgage calculator available for customer self-service
Mobile and internet banking options available for digital access
Community-focused board and shareholders committed to local reinvestment
cons: Limited to Alva, Oklahoma geography with only one physical branch location
Website lacks specific product rates, fee schedules, or detailed service offerings
No mention of business banking, investment products, or wealth management services
Limited information about loan products, terms, or eligibility requirements
No evidence of online account opening or digital-first banking capabilities
best_for: Residents of Alva, Oklahoma and surrounding communities seeking personalized local banking
Customers who value relationship-based banking and personal service over digital-first platforms
Local homeowners and community members seeking mortgages with local decision-making
Small business owners in the Alva area needing a relationship-based bank
diagnosis: Community Bank is best for Alva-area residents and local business owners who prioritize personalized, relationship-based banking with community involvement over digital convenience or broader product offerings. The primary caveat is strict geographic limitation—this is a single-branch local bank, not suitable for customers seeking widespread branch access or those relocating outside the Alva region.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
